The '''''Turbostorm''-class gunship''' was a heavily-armored gunship model produced by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]], considered ancient by the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Characteristics==
These gunships could carry at least 24 soldiers in their cargo bay; the door to the bay opened by swinging out, serving as a loading ramp. They were armed with port and starboard [[KX-4 laser cannon turret]]s, fore and aft [[MG3 mini-missile|MG3]] missiles, and a belly-mounted [[Sunfire 1000]]. Their armor could withstand fire from armaments as powerful as a [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad laser cannon]]. Primary modifications for atmospheric deployment included [[Turbofan/Legends|turbojets]], [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlifts]], and [[antisepsis field]]s to protect the ship and its systems from metal- and silicate-eating fungi. The vessel could only reach speeds of .5 past supersonic, but still included artificial gravity.<ref name="Shatterpoint" />

==History==
The ''Turbostorm''-class gunship was produced by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] some time prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The [[Balawai]] government on [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]] used them in the [[Summertime War]], purchasing them from the proximal [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Opari (planet)|Opari]] and modifying them for atmospheric flight. As of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], during the Clone Wars, the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] supplied them freely to the Haruun Kal government.<ref name="Shatterpoint" />

The [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat|Skipray Blastboat]], a craft designed just before the breakout of the Clone Wars, was based heavily on the ''Turbostorm'' design.<ref name="SWEotE:RPGBeta">[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Beta|''Star Wars: Edge of the Empire'' Beta]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Turbostorm''-class gunship was introduced in the [[2003]] novel [[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] by [[Matthew Stover]], which was published as the first in the [[Clone Wars multimedia project]].<ref name="Shatterpoint" /> It later received entries in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' in [[2008]]<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> and the role-playing rulebooks [[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Beta|''Star Wars: Edge of the Empire'' Beta]] and [[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Edge of the Empire'' Core Rulebook]] in [[2012]] and [[2013]] respectively.<ref name="EotEC">[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Edge of the Empire'' Core Rulebook]]</ref><ref name="SWEotE:RPGBeta" />
